title: echinochloa crus-galli subsp. spiralis
intro: Echinochloa crus-galli subsp. spiralis, commonly known as barnyard grass, is a type of annual grass belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and boosting the immune system. Echinochloa crus-galli subsp. spiralis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems.
